description_long: This object consists of three vibrant, fantastical potted plants with tall, cylindrical green bodies that have a slightly bulbous base and vertical ridges. Each plant is topped with a large, faceted, purple crystal-like structure partially enveloped by the plant's green leaves, which curl upward and outward. Thin, yellow, tendril-like filaments extend from the tops, some of which are tipped with small golden spheres, while several floating purple hexagonal shapes hover above the crystals, suggesting a magical or otherworldly quality. The base of each plant is surrounded by a blue-green, irregularly shaped platform that mimics a stylized patch of soil or moss. The overall appearance is highly stylized, with smooth, glossy surfaces and a whimsical, alien aesthetic. No traditional pot is visible, as the base appears to be an organic extension of the plant itself.
description: A group of three stylized, alien-like potted plants with green, ridged bodies, purple crystal tops, and floating geometric shapes, all set on a blue-green organic base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three plants with their purple crystal tops, yellow tendrils, and floating hexagons clearly visible, with the tallest plant in the center.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the height difference between the plants and the arrangement of the floating hexagons above each crystal.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the vertical ridges and the organic, wavy base, with the crystals partially obscured by the plant bodies.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back curvature of the tallest plant and the tendrils extending upward, with the smallest plant positioned to the right.
